suggestions: Verify vectorized paths are active where available.
Review memory access patterns for NUMA effects.

notes: s390x uses cpum_cf (counter facility) and cpum_sf (sampling facility) for profiling.
Sampling facility (cpum_sf) required for call stack capture — may need kernel config.
Limited perf event support in older kernels; verify available events with `perf list`.
For DPDK: s390x support is more limited; check which PMDs are available.
No backend stall event is available on s390x via standard perf.
